description: The BooleanMemberEditor component is commonly used in Scene Inspectors to allow toggling of booleans even if they are a sub property of a type like a Bool3 Using ``_path``. This can be utilized in Ref Hacking.

fields.Continuous: Whether editing of this field instantly updates the ``_target``.
fields._path: The sub path under ``_target``. This can be something like "x" to represent the first value of a Bool3 field.
fields._target: The bool field or a field with a toggleable bool subfield.
fields._stateDrive: The field to drive with the state of ``_target``->``_path``
